reasoning: Host Hotels and Resorts (HST) just reported an earnings and revenue beat on November 5, 2025, which led to a stock surge on November 7 and various target-price upgrades from analysts (including Compass Point and JP Morgan) on November 7–9. This provides strong support for short-term positive continuation due to the post-earnings announcement drift (PEAD) anomaly and incoming institutional flows driven by upgrades. Consequently, the probability of the price being higher than the November 7 (last trading day before Nov 9) market close is set moderately high for the near term. Over longer horizons (1-month and 3-months), increasing random-walk variance in the stock price, possible mean reversion from technical 'overbought' levels, and an anticipated ~$0.20 ex-dividend drop likely occurring in late December diminish the directional certainty, driving the probabilities closer to 0.5 as the forecast horizon extends.
